TestCase z27Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.a != NULL) {
        int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    } else {
        follow_case.a = NULL;
    }
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n <= 0 || follow_case.a == NULL) {
        // Nothing to process, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] > 0) {
            follow_case.a[i] = 0;
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
